_comment: Copy to watcher.json and edit. Run: python watch.py [--config watcher.json]
_mode_help: 'always' = daemon (watchdog), 'scan' = one-shot for cron, 'HH:MM' = daily at that time
_stabilize_help: Seconds a file must be unchanged before ingestion starts (guards against partial Samba uploads)
_log_help: Main watcher log (rotated). Each category folder also gets its own .ingest-log.csv
